XOnlineStatWriteEx

Sets statistical information for one or more specified players or Xbox Live teams.

HRESULT XOnlineStatWriteEx(
    DWORD dwNumStatProcs,
    const XONLINE_STAT_PROC *pStatProcs,
    HANDLE hWorkEvent,
    PXONLINETASK_HANDLE phTask
);

Parameters

dwNumStatProcs

[in] Number of XONLINE_STAT_PROC structures in the array pointed to by the pStatProcs parameter.

pStatProcs

[in] Array of XONLINE_STAT_PROC structures that are used to report stats for each player. A player can be a user or an Xbox Live team.

hWorkEvent

[in, optional] Handle to a caller-created event object. This object is signaled when there is work to do by calling the XOnlineTaskContinue function. The caller can pass in NULL instead, indicating that the caller is to poll XOnlineTaskContinue itself.

phTask

[out] Address of an XONLINETASK_HANDLE that receives the task that stores the stats. This task sends the storage request to the statistics service and receives the response. This handle must be pumped to completion by XOnlineTaskContinue. Call the XOnlineTaskClose function to close the task.

Note    To throttle requests sent to the statistics service, XOnlineTaskContinue returns the value XONLINE_E_TASK_ABORTED_BY_DUPLICATE if the task is still being pumped when a second operation is started.

Return Values

Returns S_OK if successful, an error code otherwise.

Remarks

This function must not be called more often than once every five minutes between game sessions. During a game session, this function can only be called once at the beginning, once at the end and every five minutes if the game session lasts longer than five minutes. This function should not be used to write to more than five leaderboards per player. For details, contact your technical game manager (TGM) or consult the Technical Certification Requirements.

The XOnlineStatWriteEx function is dynamically throttled by the server depending on the server's load.

This function can be called only with direct user input related to statistics.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Xonline.h.

Import Library: Use Xonline.lib.

See Also

Xbox Live Functions | XOnlineStatRead, XOnlineStatWrite, XONLINE_STAT_PROC
